creator: stephen@FreeBSD.org
text:
The private key for generating pgp signatures for CTM was corrupt.  As a result, I had to create a new private key.

See
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/ctm-users/2012-December/thread.html
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/ctm-announce/2012-December/000029.html

Fix: 

Update the website for the following email lists (for example http://lists.freebsd.org/mailman/listinfo/ctm-cvs-cur)

ctm-svn-cur-fast
ctm-cvs-cur
ctm-cvs-cur-fast
ctm-ports-cur
ctm-src-3
ctm-src-3-fast
ctm-src-4
ctm-src-4-fast
ctm-src-5
ctm-src-5-fast
ctm-src-6
ctm-src-6-fast
ctm-src-7
ctm-src-7-fast
ctm-src-8
ctm-src-8-fast
ctm-src-9
ctm-src-9-fast
ctm-src-cur
ctm-src-cur-fast
ctm-svn-cur
ctm-svn-cur-fast

to use this key.
